name: Workers comp or sue third party for ladder fall in Bountiful involving faulty equipment?

mainEntity.name: Workers comp or sue third party for ladder fall in Bountiful involving faulty equipment?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp for basics, sue third-party for more if negligent.[1][3]
acceptedAnswer.description: File workers' comp first (no-fault), then sue third-party manufacturer if negligent for extra damages like pain/suffering.[1][3] Comp doesn't cover non-economic losses.[1] Key factors: comp bars employer suit; third-party ok; higher payouts possible.[3] Report comp immediately, investigate fault, attorney pursues both tracks.[1] Maximizes recovery.

description: Comp for basics, sue third-party for more if negligent.[1][3]
